title: Evangelion 3010 not yet in production
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0+1.0 not yet in production?             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Fri Jan 23, 2015 7:59 pm https://translate.google.com/translate?sl=fr&tl=en&js=y&prev=_t&hl=en&ie=UTF-8&u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.manganimation.net%2Finterviews%2Fsushio-shigeto-koyama-takafumi-hori-du-studio-trigger-connichi-2014&edit-text= Rough google translate of relevant question in article: Shigeto Koyama Takafumi Hori and confessed to wanting to work in this environment through Evangelion. Will you attend Evangelion Final? TH: When I was in high school, I actually want to be aware of facilitator watching Evangelion, including scenes of You Yoshinari. SK: At that time Gainax was extraordinary stuff, Daicon Evangelion movies up. It was there that he had to go to work! Evangelion has opened new perceptive for animation. S: For my part, I subscribe to college but hey I did not know what to do with my life. My older sister then gave me lots of business brochures and animator seemed interesting. I kinda worked my drawing and then I applied in this studio Gainax what. Evangelion 3.0 like I have not been up to, what I'll do on the Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 is up my level. I will do my best. SK: The production has not yet begun, it is not known when it will begin.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 23, 2015 8:23 pm ElMariachi , help? Original article here: http://www.manganimation.net/interviews/sushio-shigeto-koyama-takafumi-hori-du-studio-trigger-connichi-2014 From what I understand (in general, I know no French), they're waiting on Animator Expo to finish before they continue work on 3.0+1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jan 23, 2015 9:40 pm Not surprised based on Anno's words in October.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Fri Jan 23, 2015 9:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: ElMariachi , help? Original article here: http://www.manganimation.net/interviews/sushio-shigeto-koyama-takafumi-hori-du-studio-trigger-connichi-2014 From what I understand (in general, I know no French), they're waiting on Animator Expo to finish before they continue work on 3.0+1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jan 24, 2015 2:30 am Honestly, that has just seemed obvious for quite a while now. Hopefully Anno will be ready to get down to it in the summer, after Expo, and we can look for a release later in 2016. The dub will be published in 2020 in conjunction with the Q one...

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Sat Jan 24, 2015 6:59 am As douchebag chocolat put it: i see you are hard at work on evangelion 4.0 you fuckin hack! (i jest, i jest) So long as its as good as im expecting i cant wait as long as it takes.

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sat Jan 24, 2015 7:23 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: ElMariachi , help? Original article here: http://www.manganimation.net/interviews/sushio-shigeto-koyama-takafumi-hori-du-studio-trigger-connichi-2014 From what I understand (in general, I know no French), they're waiting on Animator Expo to finish before they continue work on 3.0+1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jan 24, 2015 8:54 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: ElMariachi , help? Original article here: http://www.manganimation.net/interviews/sushio-shigeto-koyama-takafumi-hori-du-studio-trigger-connichi-2014 From what I understand (in general, I know no French), they're waiting on Animator Expo to finish before they continue work on 3.0+1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jan 24, 2015 9:01 am QUICK EVERYONE! ACT SURPRISED AT THIS NEWS! PS: ElMariachi you have a few typos/grammors here and there.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Jan 24, 2015 9:06 am Well, at least we now know that, when it'll eventually be released, we're in for some spectacular animation, surpassing even the level of Q. I'm looking forward to 2018.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jan 24, 2015 9:59 am ElMariachi wrote: [*] Shigeto Koyama confirms that Shin Eva's production has yet began, and that they don't know when it will.[/list]

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jan 24, 2015 11:06 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: PS: ElMariachi you have a few typos/grammors here and there.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sat Jan 24, 2015 1:55 pm Looks like Anno wasn't joking when he said it could take up to six years to get Shin Eva out. That's a little disappointing. But hey we have other stuff to look foward to this year.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Sat Jan 24, 2015 3:05 pm What's disappointing is that June 6, 2015 (Shinji's 14th Birthday) would've been an AWESOME release date for the movie. Everything would've come full circle (2015 being the year the show originally takes place in. Eva's 20th anniversary. The completion of Shinji's story/saga in the Theatrical movies). Then they could've released the Blu-ray on the January 1st, 2016 (New Year's).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 24, 2015 3:38 pm Instead, look for the series re-issue on those dates.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jan 24, 2015 4:08 pm I was reminded when writing Afterwards that the dates of Jo and Ha are shown by analysis of on-screen calendars to be 2016 and 2017 - so a release of the last film late next year would not be inappropriate (if they can make it that soon).

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Jan 24, 2015 4:17 pm Sicarius VI wrote: Anno wasn't joking when he said it could take up to six years to get Shin Eva out.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Jan 24, 2015 4:24 pm I'm hoping that meant six years from Q . And if "up to" is not strictly held to, a date in late 2016 or sometime in 2017 is still possible.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 24, 2015 4:27 pm Hm. I really don’t know how to feel about this, really. Anima(tor) Expo is a hell of a ride, so I’d rather he not part from that. I’ve enjoyed every single one of his productions, so if he ditches Eva Shin all together, I’ll still enjoy whatever else he makes. If he waits until he’s ready before making Eva Shin, it’ll be the best thing to come from NTE so far. And, uh... yeah. Pretty much.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sat Jan 24, 2015 4:37 pm pwhodges wrote: I'm hoping that meant six years from Q . And if "up to" is not strictly held to, a date in late 2016 or sometime in 2017 is still possible.
